title: Snowflake Christmas Ribbon - 1 Inch x 11 Yards White for Crafts, Gift Wrapping, Winter & Xmas Decor
features: Package Content: You will receive a roll of Christmas snowflake ribbon with the approximate size of 25mm x 10m / 1 inch x 11yards. You can cut it into proper length according to your needs. Enough for your decoration and DIY needs.

Reliable Material: Our Christmas ribbon for crafts is made of good quality polyester, sturdy, reusable and long-lasting, smooth and wrinkle free, not easy to break off. Exquisite snowflakes are clearly printed, very exquisite and beautiful.
Perfect Decoration: With white snowflakes printed, the Christmas ribbon looks very aesthetic, which can create a strong Christmas atmosphere for handicrafts and gifts.
Christmas Theme: With our Christmas snowflake ribbon, your Christmas tree and Christmas presents will be special and delicate. It is suitable for various Christmas themed party and winter holiday.

Versatile: Our snowflake ribbon is suitable for various occasions, such as Christmas, wedding party, bridal party, valentine day, gift wrapping, DIY crafts, invitation cards, greeting cards, scrapbooks, etc.
description: Specification: Color: white Material: polyester Product Size: 25mm x 10m / 1 inch x 11yards Package details: 1 x Christmas snowflake ribbon Note: Due to manual measurement, the size and weight may have a certain error.
